programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Wintry Wife
programme.desc: Inventor Walter Randall wants a divorce from his cold-blooded wife, Laura, in order to be with Phyllis Hudson. Laura decides to get back at Walter by blackmailing one of his assistants into building a bomb that will destroy Walter's underwater sounding invention.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock defends himself against a murder charge after a judge who issued him a contempt citation is found dead.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A woman asks Harriet to help her get an eviction order rescinded. The chief gives Parker a new radar gun - and soon comes to regret it. Sheriff McComb requests that Gillespie and Bubba help investigate a murder. Meanwhile Lonnie and Luann search for the boy who reported the murder.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Film makers film a documentary at Picket's Plant and make Erin the "star"". "

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Matt runs into an old flame named Sarah who now runs a one-woman saloon for bandits out in the desert. Matt will have to pass as a villain in order to save Sarah's reputation as a trusted confidant.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: While talking with an Indian, Ben is given an unexpected present—a woman. She is a young white woman who has lived with the Indians since she was a little girl and knows nothing of the white man's ways.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When his employer begins to suspect him of embezzlement, bookkeeper Asa Manning decides to hire a professional gunman to take care of the problem.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Although a drought has forced local cowhands to seek work on a railroad construction project, railroad executives are afraid that their workers will desert them if they believe an old man's claim that he has found a way to make rain.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "A man finds a corpse that looks remarkably like himself. On an impulse he takes on the persona of the dead man only to find he was a living legend of west and had made a lot of enemies along the way."

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: Roy spends the night at John's place while his house is being fumigated, which is one night too many. A woman is trapped inside a car while it burns around her; the ambulance carrying Roy and the victim is hit by a car. A man having a heart attack refuses to leave a poker game unless John agrees to play out the man's hand. An explosion at an abandoned refinery injures several workers.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye hits Major Burns and Houlihan is a witness. Despite Hawkeye and Trapper's claims that it wasn't intentional, Frank makes allegations against Hawkeye, and he is put in house arrest facing court martial. A female colonel is sent to inspect the nurses. When she cries "Rape!" when Burns visits her tent, Houlihan recants her story, and Burns, not Hawkeye, ends up under house arrest.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye, Houlihan and Klinger go to an aid station at the front. Working closely together under heavy fire and unsanitary medical conditions, the three return to camp with new found respect for one another.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye and Trapper prevent a GI from marrying a call girl who has TB, while trying to help a Korean soldier join his pregnant wife. Radar, of course, provides his usual invaluable help.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The camp prepares for a visit from General MacArthur. Klinger dresses as the Statue of Liberty as the General's jeep drives through the camp. MacArthur is so impressed, he salutes!

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney's attempts to train an old mutt named Blue as a police dog coincide with a manhunt for an escaped criminal.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney and Thelma Lou have an argument. They reconcile quickly, but it leads to other arguments between Andy and Barney, Thelma Lou and Helen, Andy and Helen, and another between Barney and Thelma Lou.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Elly comes running to Granny with distressing news, sickness! Fairchild, Elly’s bear, is sick. Meanwhile, at the bank, Miss Jane has a visitor, Lieutenant Mark Templeton of the US Navy. He is Matthew Templeton’s brother. Drysdale kicks the two out, and Jane takes Mark to the Clampetts to meet the beautiful Elly. At this time, Granny made medicine for Elly May’s bear, but Jethro ate it. Elly tries to remake it, but fails, and ends up looking a mess.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.sub-title: A Star Named Arnold Is Born: Part 2
programme.desc: Oliver and Lisa chaperone Arnold to Hollywood for his screen test. Producer Boris Fedor isn't interested in the pig; he's just using him to pressure a greedy horse to come back to work. When the horse's agent balks, the publicity machine starts promoting Arnold as the studio's next big star. A stunned Oliver, who came along for laughs, can't believe what he's witnessing.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Carter convinces the German he is one of them when he is captured in German uniform.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan tries to save Klink from an officer who plans on turning him in for not having balanced books.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.desc: In Computer Date, Carol meets a blind date who knows as many fun facts as she does. Then, in Tacky Song, Carol plays a dowdy librarian singing "The Lady Is a Tramp". Finally, in Dr. Jekyll and Ms. Hyde, a doctor's experiment goes horribly wrong when he continually turns into his female alter ego.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Lonely Heiress
programme.desc: Heiress Marilyn Cartright places an ad in a magazine in order to find love and companionship. In reality, Marilyn is looking for the con artist who swindled and drove her sister to suicide.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Trapped in a recurring nightmare, a man tries to persuade those who are sentencing him to death that the whole scenario is not real.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A publisher finds more fact than fiction in an author’s text.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A homemaker decides to play investigator when she starts to think that a neighbor is up to no good.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix searches for the identity of the murdering punks who held him hostage in a desert diner.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: An ex-con is threatened when his safe cracking skills are needed for a theft of 1 million dollars.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: J.R. goes from skeptic to believer when he helps a psychic investigate the disappearances of several young women.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: A botched gas station robbery results in murder and abduction.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon investigate a scam involving a phony LAPD newsletter, which comes with a card for subscribers entitling the bearer to preferential treatment from the police.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: "A drunk's antics appear harmless at first; a stakeout uncovers a cash stash."

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: After his wife's credit card is turned down attempting to buy a washing machine, an irate Reed begins a long and painful process with his bank to get his credit rating corrected. Out on patrol, he and Malloy investigate a parking lot hit-and-run accident based on the victim's recollection of the perpetrator's license plate number, search for two runaways who steal camping gear from a store's basement and make a rare mistake after responding to a liquor store robbery.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Beloved game show host Mr. Quizzer hosts his first retro-styled holiday variety special."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Ward comes down hard on Wally after he comes home two hours late, this fuels June and Ward's suspicions that Wally is contemplating joining the Merchant Marines. June had discovered some pamphlets hidden in his dresser drawer. However, little does anyone know, Wally has been getting the information for Lumpy who's seriously thinking of joining.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver gets a new girl in his class and is instantly smitten. He begins walking her home from school but he soon realizes that the girl has an agenda on her mind. Her sole purpose is to get close to Beaver in order to get close to Wally. This leads Beaver to accuse Wally of stealing his girl.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Angry Dead Man
programme.desc: Willard Nesbitt faked his drowning death in a boating accident so his wife could collect the double indemnity life insurance money.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When a blackmailing call girl is charged with murder, Matlock is hired to bring the real killer to justice.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A swindlers homecoming upsets his wife and the families of his victims - especially Etta.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: John-Boy is still missing, but a publisher has his journal and wants to publish it

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: When Danny Stalcup, a young member of a gang on the run, is mortally wounded in a fall, Doc Adams is kidnapped, along with Festus, and forced to help.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: When Hoss is set up to take the fall for a bank robbery in another town, the help of an eccentric gold prospector appears to be all that stands between him and the real bandit's bullet.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas McCain gives blood to save a dying man and is surprised by Marshal Torrance's odd behavior toward the man. Then three men arrive from a nearby town and demand custody of the stranger.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark's finding the body of a murder victim starts Lucas, his friend, Artemus, and Marshal Torrance on a search for the killer.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "Overwhelmed girl takes on her father's responsibility as man of the house after he passes. She cares for her pregnant mother and 5 sisters and is suspicious of a young drifter who joins the train and pays too much attention to the girls."

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: The firemen enter a contest to invent new firefighting tools. The paramedics handle victims of possible radiation poisoning. A comatose man is suffering from a mysterious ailment. A woman’s overweight son is wedged in her living room ceiling. The firemen respond to a leak at a chemical plant.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: On payday, Frank buys two sets of pearls, a cheap imitation one for Margaret and a real one for his wife. After some talk, Radar gets Hawkeye $3,000 in lost earnings, Hawkeye gives it to Mulcahy for the orphans, but then the army wants the money back. Trapper wins big at poker after using Hawkeye's watch as a stake, so Hawkeye takes his winnings and gives them to the army to avoid a stay in the honeymoon suite of The Stockade Hilton.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Colonel Flagg blows into camp trying to obtain penicillin to barter for information. But Flagg comes down with appendicitis, and the only penicillin he gets is in the keister.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Henry finally gets his discharge. While he is tying things up, Burns prepares for his new command. Henry bids a tearful adieu, but not before Klinger turns up in an outrageous tropical outfit.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: "Trapper is shipped home while Hawkeye is on R&R. Hawkeye speeds to Kimpo with Radar to catch Trapper's plane, but they just miss him. While they are there, they pick up BJ Hunnicut and take him back to camp. On the way back, BJ is introduced to the Korean War. "

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Fred the grocery store clerk repeatedly sweeps trash into the street, even after Barney writes him a citation. Fred threatens that if he ever sees Barney out of uniform, he'll pound him, causing Barney to leave his uniform on at all times.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie finds a lost wallet containing $50, and just as he's waited the seven-day period to claim the money as his own, the owner steps forward.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny predicts that Elly will get married, but Jed doesn’t believe her. However, when Jethro tells them Sonny Drysdale is returning, Granny believes that this will be Jed’s future son-in-law. Drysdale believes the same thing, and has Sonny and Elly set up to be married. Drysdale makes Sonny get a job, selling beauty products door-to-door.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.sub-title: Guess Who's Not Going To The Luau?
programme.desc: Peterson's Poi Juice is giving away a trip to Hawaii and Arnold Ziffel is chosen as the winner. When the ad agency rep meets Arnold and discovers he's not a human, he tries to disqualify the swine. Famous pig lawyer Oliver Douglas is retained to fight for Arnold's winnings.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.sub-title: Some Of Their Planes Are Missing
programme.desc: The Germans plan to send their men into England via captured planes.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: After Burkhalter finds him sleeping on the job, Schultz is ordered to the Russian Front.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.desc: In Carol and Sis, Carol and Harvey fight in front of an encounter group. Then, in Fun in a Saloon, a western bad guy starts a dancing brawl. Finally, in Court Stenographer, Carol plays a recorder who can't help but interfere with the court case.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Green-eyed Sister
programme.desc: Arthur West, a disreputable private investigator, has found J. J. Stanley in a cheap motel. He knows Stanley and his partner, Ned Bain, were involved in the embezzlement of the Texas National Bank. He wants to blackmail Bain into giving him money to keep quiet.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.sub-title: Five Characters In Search Of An Exit
programme.desc: A hobo, clown, bagpipe player, ballerina and military officer are trapped in a huge cylinder.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A man believes that his sister murdered his wife.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A woman has her husband committed to a mental institution.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: An old adversary from Mannix's time serving in the Korean War, whom he thought was dead, sets out to kill him.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: The parents of a teen girl hire Cannon when they discover a charismatic young man is trying to lure their daughter into a cult.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: While investigating a death at a posh sanitarium, Betty discovers a sinister plot to defraud the patients.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Homer Bedloe's latest plan for decommissioning the Hooterville Cannonball falls on the holidays, as the gang are decorating the train for the annual Christmas Eve caroling run.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Scrooge-like Homer Bedloe derails Kate's plan for Christmas Eve caroling and gift distributing aboard the Hooterville Cannonball.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts get a new next-door neighbor, and when Aggie, the maid of Mrs. Phillip Brentwood Carrington III, drops by to the use the phone, the Clampetts mistake her for Carrington. This is the first rich neighbor who has proven to be kind and considerate. Drysdale is happy because this rich woman has moved next door and might be a wife for Jed. Granny also sees her as a match for Jed. The two try to set Jed and Aggie up in different ways.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Drysdale organizes a financial syndicate, which includes a billionaire who he wants in his bank. Jed is one of the potential members of this group, but never makes the meeting because a new invention of Jethro’s, a chemical that turns water into gasoline, doesn’t work. When Jed finally arrives, it is too late, and Mr. Sebastian has left. Jane suggests that he visits him at his health club.

programme.title: Popeye and Pals
programme.sub-title: Klondike Casanova, I’ll Be Skiing Ya, Mister And Mistletoe
programme.desc: "Fur farmer Bluto kidnaps Olive Oyl., Popeye and Olive go skiing, and ski instructor Bluto tries to break them up., Bluto disguises himself as Santa to woo Olive."

programme.title: The Tom and Jerry Show
programme.sub-title: Night Before Christmas, Pup's Christmas, Southbound Duckling
programme.desc: "It is Christmas Eve and Tom gets to know the spirit of giving after he tosses Jerry outside in the cold when he catches him trying to get to a present., Two pups experience their very first Christmas and are both excited and fascinated., Tom is hungry for a duck meal and Quacker, Jerry's friend, plans to head south for the winter unlike all the other ducks."

programme.title: The Woody Woodpecker Show
programme.sub-title: His Better Elf, A Fish Story, Banquet Busters, Room And Wrath, Hi-seas Hi-jacker, Adventures Of Tom Thumb Jr., Ballyhooey
programme.desc: "Woody finds a four-leafed clover that transforms into a small green woodpecker claiming to be a leprechaun named "Clancy." As his three wishes to become rich go awry, Woody realizes this was all a lesson to get him to work to earn a fortune., A doctor tells Charlie a pet fish will make him less nervous. After struggling to get the fish tank home, Charlie is forced by Bessie to return it., Woody and Andy are true starving musicians who agree to a gig in a fancy mansion in the hopes of nabbing some food., Smedley tries to evict Chilly from his Snowtel when he can only pay the bill in fish., Inspector Willoughby pursues a pirate holding up a battleship., Tom Thumb discovers a new island, but he's taken by a giant who always wanted a son., Woody tries to watch his quiz show, but it is interrupted by silly commercials."

programme.title: Bugs Bunny and Friends
programme.sub-title: A Hare Grows In Manhattan, Snow Time For Comedy, Hen House Henery, Wabbit Who Came To Supper, Tweetie Pie, The Old Grey Hare
programme.desc: "Now a Hollywood star, Bugs tells a reporter of his humble beginnings on the east side of New York. , Two curious dogs chase a bone in a snowy wilderness setting. , Henery Hawk sets out to catch Foghorn but he scolds Henery and tells him to start small., Elmer Fudd and his dogs are hunting for Bugs Bunny in the woods. , When Tweety is brought in from the cold, the owner warns Sylvester to leave him alone. , Elmer Fudd asks God when he will finally be able to catch Bugs. "

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Jim and Artie are pitted against a super-genius who sends them fake newspapers with predictions of the deaths of their friends.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "When three wagons are late in the desert, Chris sends Duke to find them and bring them to the wagon train as the train cannot wait for them. It may be a suicide mission due to water holes drying up and the missing people's personal issues."

programme.title: The Big Valley
programme.desc: Nick is bit by a rabid wolf, a virtual death sentence. Not wanting his family to witness his decline, he leaves, making Heath swear he won’t tell the others what has happened. Nick hopes that in his final 60 days he will do something worthwhile.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Headed to Abilene to bring a woman $11 owed to her, Fetus teaches two boys a lesson along the way.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Certain that he is too old to stand against a notorious gang of bank robbers when news arrives that Virginia City will soon be next in a long string of successful raids, the terrified townsfolk demand Sheriff Coffee's resignation to make way for a younger lawman.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When renegade Apaches wound Lucas and kidnap Mark, Marshal Torrance joins with U.S. Marshal Sam Buckhart to form a rescue posse.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is the town's representative to the railroad commission until an infamous train robber dies and leaves his ill-gotten wealth to him. Lucas must clear his name and stop the reckless ambition of his replacement.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: Burt Harvey is accused of cowardice at Gettysburg by his new father-in-law.

programme.title: Have Gun, Will Travel
programme.desc: Paladin gets involved in a dispute between the patriarch of a farming family and a matriarch saloon owner and her family who believe land they claim rights to holds an Aztec treasure.

programme.title: Wanted Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Owing a favor to a sheriff, Josh agrees against better judgment to go to the lawless town of Bent Horn to bring back a man wanted for bank robbery and murder.

programme.title: The Three Stooges
programme.sub-title: Pardon My Scotch, Three Little Beers, Termites Of 1938, Heavenly Daze, Merry Mavericks, Rhythm And Weep
programme.desc: "The Stooges are running the local drugstore and mix up a potion that a desperate businessman decides to sell as scotch. , The Stooges are inept deliverymen at a brewery. , The Stooges pair with three dancers to put on a Broadway show, not realizing their sponsor is an escaped mental patient., The Stooges are pest exterminators, mistakenly hired by a rich lady looking for an escort to a fancy society party. The Stooges wreck the fancy mansion where the party is taking place and befuddle the guest of honor, an English Lord. , A divine comedy classic! Shemp goes to Heaven but isn't allowed through the Pearly Gates until he can reform bad boys Larry and Moe. , Set in the old west, the Stooges are mistaken for lawmen and manage to capture a gang of crooks. The boys then get the job of guarding some money in an old house reputed to be haunted by the ghost of an Indian Chief. The crooks escape and go after the money disguised as ghosts, but Shemp, disguised as the Indian Chief, manages to knock them out. "

programme.title: Svengoolie
programme.desc: "Academy Award-nominee Claude Rains gives a moving performance in this suspenseful, lyrical update to Gaston Leroux's macabre classic. As the tale goes, Rains plays the famously disfigured musician who haunts the Paris Opera House and kidnaps the beautiful young soprano whom he has trained. Featuring gorgeous music and elaborate sets, this "Phantom of the Opera" is a more-than-worthy version of a much-interpreted and beloved story."

programme.title: Batman
programme.sub-title: When The Rat's Away, The Mice Will Play
programme.desc: The Riddler blackmails Commissioner Gordon: unless he's paid $1 million dollars, he'll destroy The Queen of Freedom Monument along with King Boris.

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.sub-title: Is There In Truth No Beauty?
programme.desc: The Enterprise is boarded by two strange visitors: Medusan Ambassador Kollos, a creature that must be kept in a box because its ugliness is enough to drive a human mad, and his aide, beautiful telepath Miranda, who senses murderous intent aboard the ship.

programme.title: Kolchak: The Night Stalker
programme.sub-title: They Have Been, They Are, They Will Be
programme.desc: An invisible alien sucks down the bone marrow of its victims while it makes repairs and looks for directions home. This is the only story where Kolchak fails to stop the "monster."

programme.title: Lost in Space
programme.desc: After an alien gives Penny a belt as a gift, telling her to guard it with her life, it isn't long before a group of aliens turns up looking for the item, and they will stop at nothing to get it.

programme.title: Voyage to the Bottom of the Sea
programme.desc: A mad art collector hijacks the Seaview in a dramatic plan to pirate Leonardo de Vinci's Mona Lisa from a French ship.

programme.title: Land of the Giants
programme.desc: Dan is accused of murdering two Giants and begins acting oddly, arousing his crewmates' suspicions.

programme.title: The Time Tunnel
programme.desc: In Paris during the French Revolution, the time travelers agree to aid Marie Antoinette in exchange for safe-conduct passes.

programme.title: The Invaders
programme.desc: Vincent recovers important information regarding the aliens just as a conspiracy targets his future.

programme.title: The Powers of Matthew Star
programme.desc: "Matthew and Walt go to Las Vegas to investigate rigged games."

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: It's the annual chess competition between Valley and Bayside. Screech is Bayside's champion so Valley decides to dig up some dirt on him.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: While putting up a new field goal post, oil is discovered. Soon the entire school is interested in the lucrative prospect of oil drilling, but Jessie doesn't like the idea.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: When Zack finds $5,000 in the mall, he plans to use the money to buy and then scalp tickets for a U2 concert.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: The gang takes summer jobs at a beach resort, but they have trouble dealing with their boss. Meanwhile, Zack falls for the boss' daughter.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: The gang all gets jobs at the Palisades mall during the holiday seasons. Zack befriends a girl who is working for Kelly. Also, Zack and Screech make friends with a homeless man.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: Zack learns that his new girlfriend is the homeless man's daughter. When she decides to get her dad a new coat but it turns up missing, her boss, Mr. Mooney, accuses her of stealing it.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Bobby becomes extremely self conscious about his height and tries different ways to make himself "big." When there's a dangerous situation at Sam's Butcher Shop, though, Bobby is exactly the right size to save the day.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Greg and Marcia rush home after school with the news that they're both running for student body president. The boys and girls each take sides and soon each one of them is accusing the other of sabotage.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Richie, Potsie and Ralph go on a trip to Chicago with the school choir. Not wanting to stay in their hotel room all night, they decide to sneak out and see a show.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Because of Squiggy's forgetfulness, Laverne and Shirley must play all the parts in Shirley's play, 'Murder in Mother Goose Land,' which a Broadway producer attends.

programme.title: A Very Merry Bugs Bunny Christmas
programme.sub-title: Bugs Bunny's Christmas Carol, Gift Wrapped, Abominable Snow Rabbit, Freeze Frame, Weasel While You Work, The Fright Before Christmas
programme.desc: "When Sam lacks the Christmas spirit, Bugs Bunny makes a plan to change his mind., It's Christmas time and Sylvester tries to switch his present with Granny's present which is Tweety in a birdcage., Bugs and Daffy decide to tunnel underground over to Palm Springs. Wrong directions end them up in the Himalayas where they run into trouble with the Abominable Snowman... , The coyote orders a blizzard machine to cover the entire desert with snow after he finds out that Road Runners are easy to catch in the cold. , During a snow-covered winter, Foghorn Leghorn uses the weasel against the barn's guard dog. , Taz breaks free of his a plane shipping crate and falls from the sky into Santa's laundry. He hijacks Santa's sleigh and ends up in Bugs' house tearing down everything, but Bugs gets wise to the Devil. "

programme.title: Holiday Special
programme.desc: "Snoopy leaves Charlie Brown to return to his original master."

programme.title: Holiday Special
programme.desc: "Charlie Brown competes in a spelling bee, and he'll need the help of Linus and Snoopy' to overcome his unlucky streak. This Academy Award nominated animated feature was the Peanuts film debut."

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: In a Christmas-themed cruise, a group of orphans and a man convicted for a crime he didn't commit are among those aboard the ship. Florence Henderson, Donna Mills and Shecky Greene guest star.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy considers moving to Raleigh for another job. An upset Barney tries to demonstrate to Andy just how bad Mayberry would be without him, creating more harm than good in his effort to get Andy to stay.

programme.title: Collector's Call
programme.desc: "Husband and wife Nick Mayor and Jen LeMasters were drawn together by their love of all things weird and wonderful. Now their home is an eccentric floor-to-ceiling showpiece of vintage toys, nostalgia items, and the occasional unclassifiable oddity. Lisa joins them for a look at some of their standout treasures – including a very rare “Alien” action figure and a spectacular Masters of the Universe ride-on Battle Cat. Joining them is vintage toy vendor Michael Tomaso, who puts a value on Nick and Jen’s entire collection, then attempts to lure them into a trade for one of their most prized items with a double-barrel offer he’s sure they can’t refuse. Though what he wants in return might be a problem."

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Trapper is shipped home while Hawkeye is on R&R. Hawkeye speeds to Kimpo with Radar to catch Trapper's plane, but they just miss him. While they are there, they pick up BJ Hunnicut and take him back to camp.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Frank settles in as commanding officer, only to have a new one appointed over his head, one that, to his chagrin, fits in very well.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: The Christmas season has everyone in the Christmas spirit. For a joke, Archie purchases some fake nose and mustache glasses that were on sale, but Mike also happened to go to that same store and hit that same sale. Meanwhile, Edith returns from a doctor checkup and confides in Gloria the fact that she has a lump in her breast and she fears it may be breast cancer.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: The clash of two worlds explodes in this episode. Mike's friend is a Draft Dodger and it is Christmas dinner and unbeknownst to Archie this guy is sitting at his Christmas dinner table. The guy is exactly everything Archie hates about Mike's generation. On top of this Archie's friend is also spending Christmas dinner with the Bunkers and he lost his son to the war.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Edith's religious faith is shaken after her friend, female impersonator Beverly LaSalle, is brutally murdered by street thugs at Christmas.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike is put in the hospital and Beverly LaSalle is murdered by a thug at Chistmas.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.desc: In Mrs. Wiggins, Mr. Tudball is thrown out of the house for playing poker. Then, in The Fruitcake, Carol tries to avoid a nervous breakdown, despite her husband's annoying behavior.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.desc: In Double Calamity, the gang parodies the film-noir classic "Double Indemnity", with Carol as Barbara Stanwyck and Steve as Fred McMurray.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob recalls when his honeymoon with Laura was canceled.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob's favorite star wants to guest on the show but only seems to cause problems.

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: The Kramdens and the Nortons fight a rent increase, though Ralph is the only one who really wants to fight.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A book on the power of thought enables an irritable man to re-create the world exactly as he wants it.

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: Blaming herself for the robbery of a priceless figurine, an apprentice nun leaves her convent to track down the thief.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble works as a kennel man for Max Bodin, a breeder of prize-winning Irish Setter show dogs, and whom is currently putting his kennel up for sale. Max's son, Johnny, and Johnny's wife Cora discover that one of the dogs has developed hip dysplasia which

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Deputy Premier Kamirov is keeping his premier "alive" by substituting a double, "Gemini." Kamirov plans to force Gemini as premier to announce his retirement and name Kamirov his successor. Kamirov will then kill Gemini and ally with the Iron Curtain again.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: A woman attempts to help her innocent fiancé and discovers a killer may still be at large.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: An officer accused of taking a bribe has chosen Sgt. Friday to represent him at his trial board hearing. Witnesses saw the officer accept the money, but he insists it was for the payback of a loan made years ago.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Drugs are found aboard a plane that has crashed in the San Fernando Valley. The pilot is quickly traced, but in order to force him to name his connection, Friday and Gannon ask the press to sit on the story for a few hours.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: When two small girls go missing, the mother is convinced that their estranged father kidnapped them. However, a preliminary investigation by Friday and Gannon determines that the man has no knowledge of his daughters' whereabouts.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: While paying a visit to the laundromat before going into work, Malloy encounters a man using the facilities to dry something much different from clothing. On patrol, he and Reed deal with a minister-in-training who uses a very unorthodox method to get his message across, try to reunite a Finnish-speaking child with her family, mediate a strange dispute between feuding neighbors and engage in a high-speed chase with a well known drug dealer.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed investigate a large car theft operation that targets older cars, then stages them around the city as abandoned vehicles so they can be towed and scrapped. Meanwhile, they try to figure out why the son of Malloy's girlfriend is getting bad grades, search for a suspect who robbed an elderly woman and attempt to rescue two foolish teenagers who enter a house that is being fumigated.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill and Toony travel to the North Pole in hopes of meeting Santa Claus!"

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Ward doesn't take any excuses when he puts his foot down and demands that Wally and Beaver clean the yard. They each reluctantly cancel their plans with Richard and Eddie and get to work but soon find themselves with distractions. This causes them to miss the deadline to call the hauler who is suppose to take all the yard waste away and this leads them to pay Eddie and Lumpy to take care of it.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: "Wally finds himself smack dab in the middle of a lover's quarrel when a woman tries to make her estranged boyfriend jealous by continually making tennis dates with Wally. Wally finds himself in an awkward position when the boyfriend threatens him."

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Blind Man's Bluff
programme.desc: Crooked jewelry store owner Karl Addison learns that he needs an operation that will temporarily blind him. Addison makes plans to rob his own store knowing that his sightlessness will provide him with a perfect alibi.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When personal trainer Harry Slade is murdered, Matlock agrees to defend his roofer, George Wilton, in a complicated case involving quite a few sexual indiscretions.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A white supremacist politician plans to have his wife's lover murdered and blame it on black radicals.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Ashley Longworth Jr returns to the mountain. He proposes to Erin and she accepts

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Harry Morgan guest stars as a farmer accused of shooting someone in the back.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Ben travels to pay his respects after receiving word that his nephew is dead. At the grave, however, Ben finds his nephew, wounded but alive.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a rancher dies after the bank forecloses the mortgage on his property, his son blames the banker for his father's death.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a wealthy rancher is killed, Mark suggests that they seek the aid of a mind reader to identify the murderer.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Duke comes across Malachi Hobart, a preacher who has dedicated his life to his fellow man. However, he soon begins to believe that the preacher is in fact a con artist using religion to swindle people out of their money.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: A screenwriter spends a day observing Squad 51 at work, including a motorcycle accident, a worker suffering from exposure to chemicals, the delivery of a baby and a fire at a toy factory.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: It happened one night: freezing cold, an artillery barrage that's coming too close, a patient going downhill and Frank's searching Hot Lips' tent for his letters.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: When Hawkeye's father is notified that he's dead, he finds it's no easy matter either to get word to him or to establish otherwise.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Its quid pro quo at the 4077th: two bottles of Scotch for secret surgery, and a tank to scare off snipers for an unauthorized shot of penicillin.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Driving back from a medical conference, Radar, Hawkeye, B.J., Sherman and Frank find themselves lost. When they decide to turn around, the bus does not want to start. And when Radar goes off in the middle of the night for the latrine, he does not immediately return.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee gets the lead role in the Centennial Pageant as Lady Mayberry. She is, however, not up to the challenge, and Andy must find a way to tell her.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: The Darlings come to Mayberry looking for a boy whom they could engage to Charlene's new baby. Opie becomes the prime target.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny checks on Mark to make sure he is all human. When she sees that he is, she is ready for him to marry Elly May, giving hints. Elly and Mark sit in the parlor, trying to be alone, but keep getting interrupted by the family, mostly Granny and Jethro. Even when they think they are alone, Jethro is watching them, but Elly chases him out. Granny decides to head to the bank and, since she helped her out, brings Miss Jane a frog to kiss, only if she wants to.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: The Douglases are asked to donate old clothing to a charity rummage sale. Lisa is glad to give away Oliver's entire wardrobe, but can't part with any of her dresses. Each has a memory attached, leading to flashbacks of Oliver asking Lisa's father for her hand in marriage, the Douglases' honeymoon in Switzerland and their first party in their new Park Avenue apartment.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan pulls a hoax to get a general to believe Klink is replacing him as chief of staff.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Crittendon is the only one to avoid capture when he and his commandos parachute into the area during a mission to capture Rommel.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.desc: In Opening Talk on Plane, passengers discuss their plans in Australia. Then, Carol and friends perform "Waltzing Matilda" and "It's Today". Next, in The Oldest Man, the Sydney orchestra is led by the Oldest Man. Finally, in The Ham Actor, an ailing Carol tries to perform, despite already being replaced by Vicki.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Fugitive Nurse
programme.desc: Janet Norris is charged with poisoning her doctor husband just before he flew to his death in his private plane. Further investigation reveals that Dr. Norris did not die in the plane crash and that he is in Mexico with his nurse mistress.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An elderly private school teacher wonders if his life has meant anything as he contemplates suicide on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.sub-title: Santa Claus And The Tenth Avenue Kid
programme.desc: A criminal fresh out of prison takes a job as Santa Claus for the holiday season.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A man plans to get rid of his nagging wife — permanently.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Two elderly spinster sisters are determined to prosecute a traffic violator. There's only one problem: The man also is a syndicate killer.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: A suicide by a pilot leads to the discovery of a plan by a mercenary group to launch a coup of a small African country.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Barnaby tangles with violent veterans of the Vietnam war as he attempts to clear the name of an Army deserter who's still missing.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: Dan Mathews desperately searches for a little girl who has been bitten by a rabid dog.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon are convinced that "Brother" William Bentley's Temple of the Expanded Mind is just a sham—a front for Bentley to sell LSD to the students of a nearby elementary school.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed are left frustrated after investigating the theft of an elderly woman's old television set, but they have hope that a recently passed law may provide her and other victims with compensation. Elsewhere on patrol, they search for an armed robber who shot an over-trusting shopkeeper, and respond to a call of an unusual armed robbery at a drive-in.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Officer Woods' new partner is a nervous and quiet recruit, and the embarrassing secret he's trying to keep from his fellow officers might actually imperil them. On today's patrol, a real estate broker's well meaning but poorly thought out gesture nearly leads to a mob scene, a drug store owner discovers a way to profit from armed robbers and an armed robbery suspect opens fire during his escape attempt.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.sub-title: Toony's Really, Really Late Christmas Eve Show
programme.desc: "When Toony can't sleep on Christmas Eve, he hosts a late-night talk show with special guests Mr. and Mrs. Claus!"

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Eddie and Wally finally get a chance to join the most exclusive social club in school, the Barons. However, after hanging out with the Barons on a Friday night, Eddie and Wally realize they don't want to be in this club because the guys really aren't who everybody thinks they are.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver, Richard, Whitey and Alan each buy sweatshirts that have monster faces on the front of them. They like them so much they each decide to wear them to school the next day. However, each one finds that their parents forbid them from wearing such hideous sweatshirts to school. However, Beaver manages to sneak out of the house with his on.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Barefaced Witness
programme.desc: In a small California town throwing a festival during which all men wear beards, Paul Drake tries to locate missing money embezzled by a former bank president.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When a police officer is murdered after exposing a group of dirty cops to top brass, Matlock agrees to take the case in defense of suspected killer Officer Johnny Bauer.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A white supremacist politician plans to have his wife's lover murdered and blame it on black radicals.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: As Christmas approaches, Mary Ellen and the baby leave to be near Curt

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: An ex-gunfighter is dying. He must reconcile with the daughters he abandoned, and find a way to be buried next to his wife, who is buried in a town that hates him.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Bruce Yarnell makes his first appearance as the Cartwrights' cousin, Muley, from Missouri. "Blessed" with a singing voice that can literally shatter glass, Muley manages to make life difficult for his rich relations.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A group of outlaws devise a plan to get rid of Lucas so they can take over the town of North Fork.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After Lucas kills a mountain man in a barroom brawl, his father arrives in North Fork determined to take revenge on Lucas and Marshal Torrance.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Mary Ellen is an orphan traveling west to join family; members of the train reject her due to her surly disposition. Her only friend is Sally Mayhew, another girl traveling west with her family dying of consumption.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: A woman's husband is trapped under their house, where a natural oil well has erupted. John tries to fix a boy's bike. A boy who wants to become a doctor is admitted to Rampart. The firemen rescue a child stuck in a pipe. Roy and John remove a ring from a young man’s finger. Roy and Capt. Stanley struggle with a shutoff valve at a burning building.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: It's Potter's anniversary. While Potter writes home, Frank and Hot Lips have a wood carving made for him, and Radar rescues a horse and makes him a present of it.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The 4077th plays host to kids bombed out of their orphanage, and at the same time has to deliver a baby and care for battle casualties.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Winchester fulfills a family Christmas tradition but has trouble maintaining the anonymity required to keep it a truly charitable act. Even Klinger lends a hand.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: To boost post-yuletide morale on Dec 26, Potter has the officers and enlisted men change places for the day.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A modern-day Scrooge (businessman Ben Weaver) causes trouble on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.sub-title: Andy And Helen Have Their Day
programme.desc: Andy and Helen are having a hard time finding quality time together, so Barney volunteers to take over for a day.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny is preparing for her Possum Queen campaign, and also wondering why Mrs. Drysdale hasn’t fought back yet. When Jed asks Drysdale about this, he starts her campaign with a false radio interview and continues to try to get a Possum festival going. Granny continues with her campaign, and Mrs. Drysdale realizes that she has been campaigning without even knowing.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Scheming to get Oliver to pay his way to a convention, Fire Chief Joe Carson appoints him as his assistant. Instead, Oliver finds the Hooterville Fire Department to be inept and ill-prepared. Oliver's call for improvements results in Uncle Joe being voted out and him being named the new chief.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan gets Klink to think he is about to capture a POW escape ring.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: LeBeau decides to escape leaving the camp without a chef.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.sub-title: Mrs. Wiggins / Harry's Mirage And Grill
programme.desc: Mrs. Wiggins, just before Christmas, Mr. Tudball conducts a fire drill to keep the insurance company appeased. Then, in Harry's Mirage and Grill, Harvey and Tim find a desert oasis with a beautiful woman -- or is it just a mirage?

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The One-eyed Witness
programme.desc: Della and Mason's dinner at a fancy French restaurant is interrupted by a phone call and an envelope containing $500 from a mysterious woman named Marian Fargo. She wants him to make an exchange: the money for some documents.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: After a derelict Santa Claus is fired on Christmas Eve, he finds a bottomless sack of gifts. With this bag he sets out to fulfill his one wish—to see the less fortunate inherit the bounties of Christmas.

programme.title: Holiday Special
programme.desc: "In an American town, an old bitter miser is given a ghostly chance at redemption on Christmas Eve."

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: Cannon is hired by a man who is charged with arson and murder by burning down his textile company which killed his wife who was trapped inside.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Barnaby tangles with violent veterans of the Vietnam war as he attempts to clear the name of an Army deserter who's still missing.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: Dan Mathews and Sergeant Corey spend Christmas Eve searching for a lost girl.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A statue of the child Jesus was stolen from a church. Joe and Bill have to get it back by Christmas. They have less than 48 hours.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: During their Christmas Eve Patrol, Malloy and Reed contemplate using their patrol car to deliver a Christmas tree to the residents of a soon-to-be-closed retirement home. Meanwhile, an elderly man's bagpipe playing is considered a public nuisance, a couple of teenagers steal a delivery truck containing radioactive material, a nervous man is desperate to cover up the smell of perfume on his clothing and an armed robbery suspect becomes intent on committing suicide-by-cop.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: On today's patrol, Malloy and Reed try to corral cattle that are wandering into the downtown area, pull over a speeding bicyclist, chase down a man with a stolen guitar and break up a bar fight. After their shift is over, Reed and his wife witness a gas station holdup on their way to dinner with Malloy and his girlfriend.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill and Toony celebrate Chrsitmas and warm up with a holiday beverage!"

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver and his friends are all psyched to go on a camping trip with Gilbert's father as an escort. However, when Gilbert's father suddenly has to work, Wally agrees to take them. Meanwhile, Eddie and Lumpy decide to secretly tag along and scare the boys with animal noises.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver and his friends decide to make a call to California to talk to Don Drysdale and they agree to chip in on the cost of the call, assuming that it's only going to be a couple dollars. However, when they're put on hold, the cost quickly jumps up to $9.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Difficult Detour
programme.desc: Contactor Pete Mallory is charged with the murder of a vacation resort developer.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When a gambler is accused of killing his bookie, Matlock agrees to take the case, believing that someone from the bookie's past is the guilty party.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A son (Edward Albert) is opposed to his father's plan to give land to slave descendants.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: As Christmas approaches, Mary Ellen and the baby leave to be near Curt

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Matt has trouble getting a fight about water rights under control when things escalate to violence.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Army soldiers and an outlaw gang have a shootout at the Ponderosa while Will is home alone. To make matters worse, Will realizes that the money in Ben's safe is in jeopardy.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Newly arrived gunslinger Al Walker throws a mammoth party at the saloon, keeping acting Marshal Ben Waller busy until Lucas is forced to intervene.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Newspaperman Byron Claremont specializes in profiles of famous gunmen. One of his stories was responsible for an old-time marshal's death; and his next subject is Lucas.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: The wagon train takes in a terrified young boy who has just seen his father murdered by a bandit gang. While Bill and Flint try to help him recover, embittered Civil War vet Ed Beaufort tells the boy that taking vengeance is the best medicine. Soon a traveling musician, Dr. Denker, joins the wagon train and he and Billy hit it off, but it becomes evident that Billy and the doctor had a prior connection.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: Roy encourages John to represent the station in the Fireman's Olympics track events. An armored car sideswipes a motorist and Station 51 must break into the van. A nurse spreads the rumor that Dr. Morton is having financial problems. Doctors treat a child with cyanide poisoning from peach pits. Dr. Brackett treats a bigamist with a skull fracture. The firemen rescue an electrocution victim hanging in mid-air and a man trapped in a warehouse fire.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Intelligence officer Colonel Flagg and psychiatrist Sidney Freedman grapple over the fate of a wounded officer, Captain Chandler, who claims to be Jesus Christ.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: B.J. writes home to his wife, Peg, reporting Klinger's escape attempts, the visit of a formidable chaplain and one of Frank's goof-ups.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye tangles with a tough Army colonel, Colonel Spiker; B.J. helps Zale, who's received a Dear John letter; and Frank looks endlessly for Korean saboteurs.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Frank has a fever and makes a will, leaving all his money to his wife and all his clothes to Hot Lips.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney acquires some fortune-telling cards and a secret box. The cards promise magical occurrences, and when his wish is granted, he becomes convinced that the box has mystical powers.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: After Otis slips and falls in the Mayberry jail, he meets an opportunistic lawyer who convinces him to sue the county.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: After Drysdale stops the clan from going back home to deliver a baby, the Clampetts try to help the Brewsters with their baby, while Jethro unsuccessfully tries to open his own version of the Kitty Kat Club. Of course, the Brewsters don't need the help because they are adopting, though after hearing the explanation given, the Clampetts believe they really need help and advice.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Eb announces his engagement to Loreli Appleby, a girl he met the day before. In an attempt to impress his future father-in-law, Eb succeeds in destroying the farmer's cabbage crop. To get back in the man's good graces, Eb pawns Oliver's cow Eleanor so he can make the Appleby's mortgage payment.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan saves a German radio expert whom the Nazis want to kill.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan convinces Klink that the kommandant is a great painter so the prisoners can meet an underground contact at an art gallery.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.desc: In Carol and Sis, Carol has the Hong Kong Flu, and Harvey is terrified he'll get it. Then, in Back Alley, a parody of "Back Street", Harvey finds himself married every time he falls in love with Carol.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Deadly Double
programme.desc: When Robert Crane is charged with the murder of his sister's estranged husband, Mason needs the testimony of sister Helen Reed to clear him of the charge. Unfortunately for all concerned, Helen suffers from multiple personality disorder.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.sub-title: Will The Real Martian Please Stand Up
programme.desc: Troopers follow the tracks from a frozen pond into a diner. Inside they find a soda jerk, a bus driver and his seven passengers. The bus driver is certain only six people boarded his bus.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: Two newlyweds stay at the same hotel as a man with whom they got into a scuffle with earlier that day.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A husband has a vague memory of helping a woman get rid of a corpse.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix seeks to prove that the death of one of his former gal-pals was not an accident.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: Cannon is hired when a young brother of a gun manufacturer and collector vanishes from sight.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: When a friend of a disco dancer is found murdered, she believes she's a killer's real target.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: A poor prospector arouses suspicion when he suddenly begins paying off long-standing debts.
